findings.description: `java.lang.Error` is referenced in the source exception handling section (3e: エラー終了) but is absent from s2 hints. Users asking about Java error handling in this handler would not retrieve s2.
findings.source_evidence: 3e: 後続ハンドラ実行中にエラー(java.lang.Error)が送出された場合は、捕捉したエラーをそのまま再送出して終了する。

findings.description: `ProcessStop` and `ProcessAbnormalEnd` appear as default values in the s3 configuration table (`[ProcessStop.class]` and `[ProcessAbnormalEnd.class]`) but are absent from s3 hints. Users asking about these classes in the context of configuration would not retrieve s3.
findings.source_evidence: normalEndExceptions: デフォルト=[ProcessStop.class], abnormalEndExceptions: デフォルト=[ProcessAbnormalEnd.class]
